workflow.name: SDLC Required Plus Optional Assessor Pending
workflow.goal: Exercise a workflow where required assessment clears and optional assessment does not block successor packaging.

parameters.change_request: Add a deterministic low-risk report command to the seeded CLI and verify with ./scripts/verify.sh.
parameters.optional_assessor_contract: The optional security assessor does not need to run for this low-risk change and must not block successor work.

instructions.content: Keep the seeded Python CLI stack and verify with ./scripts/verify.sh.
